programmes.statusNote: The current 2026-27 Programme page confirms a 24-credit-point award comprising all four 3-credit Core Courses and any four of the seven 3-credit Courses in the open Heritage Education and Management Specialisation. Current EdUHK curriculum-module pages and the public official Moodle course search map all eleven published titles to CHI6936, HEM6020-HEM6028 and PRJ6010. HEM6028 Internship in Cultural Heritage Management is confirmed by its official 2025-26 Moodle course instance because the 2026-27 Semester 2 instance is not yet published; the current Programme page retains the identical title and 3-credit value. The Xiqu Specialisation and part-time mode are not open for application in 2026-27 and are therefore not modelled as current completion paths.

courseGroups.name: Core Courses
courseGroups.ruleText: Complete all four Core Courses (12 credit points).

courses.name: Methods in Research for Cultural Heritage Education and Management
Development and Management of Cultural Industries

courseGroups.name: Heritage Education and Management Specialisation
courseGroups.ruleText: Choose any four of the seven Courses in the Heritage Education and Management Specialisation (12 credit points).

courses.name: Exploring Hong Kong's Intangible Cultural Heritage
History, Society and Culture of Lingnan
Communication and Marketing in Cultural Industries
Independent Project in Cultural Heritage Management
